pkgmetadata.longdescription: OpenTelemetry Distropypi.. pypi image httpsbadge.fury.iopyopentelemetry-distro.svg target httpspypi.orgprojectopentelemetry-distroInstallation------------ pip install opentelemetry-distroThis package provides entrypoints to configure OpenTelemetry.References---------- OpenTelemetry Project httpsopentelemetry.io_ Example using opentelemetry-distro httpsopentelemetry.iodocsinstrumentationpythondistro_
